nodes.name: Incoming Lead
nodes.notes: Receives POST requests from the website lead capture form. Protected by secret header token and rate limiting.

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitize Input
nodes.notes: Rejects invalid emails, strips HTML/script tags, checks honeypot field for spam detection

nodes.name: A/B Test Assignment
nodes.notes: Randomly assigns variant A or B for scoring prompt A/B testing

nodes.name: Normalize & Structure Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes and structures incoming data into a consistent schema

nodes.name: Apify — Website Content Crawler
nodes.notes: Crawls company website to extract tech stack, company size, and growth signals. Targets /about, /product, /pricing, /blog, /careers pages.

nodes.name: Merge & Enrich Crawl Data
nodes.notes: Merges all crawled page text into enriched_context (max 6000 chars), extracts meta descriptions and detected technologies

messages.content: You are a B2B sales qualification expert for NexusGate — an open-source AI Agent & LLM monitoring platform built for engineering teams deploying LLMs in production.

=IDEAL CUSTOMER PROFILE (ICP):
- AI/ML engineers or teams actively deploying or experimenting with LLMs
- DevOps or platform engineers building LLM-powered pipelines
- Companies with 10–500 employees in tech, fintech, healthtech, or SaaS
- Teams using OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, or open-source models (Llama, Mistral, etc.)
- Use cases: LLM observability, cost tracking, prompt management, agent monitoring

NON-ICP (score low):
- Non-technical roles (e.g., marketing, sales) with no developer context
- Consumer apps with no LLM infrastructure
- Companies with no signal of AI/ML activity

INPUT:
- Company website content: {{ $json.enriched_context }}
- Self-reported use case: {{ $json.use_case }}
- Detected technologies: {{ $json.detected_technologies.join(', ') }}

TASK:
Score this lead from 0 to 10 based on ICP fit. Return ONLY valid JSON in this format:
{
  "score": <integer 0–10>,
  "reasoning": "<2–3 sentence explanation referencing specific signals from the content>",
  "icp_signals": ["<signal 1>", "<signal 2>"],
  "disqualifiers": ["<any red flags>"]
}

Do not include any text outside the JSON object.

nodes.name: OpenClaw — Score Lead (Variant A)
nodes.notes: Scoring Prompt Variant A — uses standard ICP rubric

messages.content: You are a senior B2B sales engineer specializing in AI/ML infrastructure. You work for NexusGate, an open-source LLM observability platform.

=You are evaluating a lead for NexusGate — open-source LLM monitoring and agent management.

SCORING RUBRIC (0-10):

**9-10 (Perfect ICP):** Actively deploying LLMs in production, mentions observability/monitoring/cost tracking, 10-500 employees, tech/fintech/healthtech/SaaS company.

**7-8 (Strong ICP):** Building with AI/ML, using major model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source), engineering team context, growing company.

**5-6 (Moderate ICP):** Some AI activity, unclear production usage, mixed technical signals.

**3-4 (Weak ICP):** Early experimentation, non-production, small team, unclear fit.

**0-2 (Non-ICP):** No AI/ML signals, non-technical company, consumer-focused, wrong company size.

INPUT:
- Company website content: {{ $json.enriched_context }}
- Self-reported use case: {{ $json.use_case }}
- Detected technologies: {{ $json.detected_technologies.join(', ') }}

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "score": <integer 0-10>,
  "reasoning": "<2-3 sentences with specific signals>",
  "icp_signals": ["list positive signals"],
  "disqualifiers": ["list negative signals"]
}

No text outside the JSON object.

nodes.name: OpenClaw — Score Lead (Variant B)
nodes.notes: Scoring Prompt Variant B — uses detailed rubric-based scoring

nodes.name: Parse Score JSON
nodes.notes: Safely parses the LLM JSON response, strips markdown code blocks, validates score range

nodes.name: Switch — Lead Router
nodes.notes: Routes leads: High (>7) → immediate outreach, Medium (3-7) → nurture, Low (<3) → log only

messages.content: You are a sales development representative for NexusGate, an open-source LLM monitoring platform.

nodes.name: OpenClaw — Generate Outreach Message
nodes.notes: Generates personalized outreach message for high-intent leads

nodes.name: Format Outreach Message
nodes.notes: Extracts and formats the outreach message for downstream nodes

nodes.name: Slack — High Intent Alert
nodes.notes: Sends real-time Slack alert to sales team with lead details and outreach draft

nodes.name: Mailchimp — Add to Nurture List
nodes.notes: Adds medium-intent leads to email nurture sequence via Mailchimp API

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Log Low Intent Lead
nodes.notes: Logs low-intent leads to Google Sheet for future analysis with score and reasoning

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Log Medium Intent Lead
nodes.notes: Logs medium-intent leads to Google Sheet for nurture tracking

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Log High Intent Lead
nodes.notes: Logs high-intent leads to Google Sheet after Slack alert is sent

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Log Error
nodes.notes: Logs workflow errors to Google Sheets for monitoring

nodes.name: Slack — Error Alert
nodes.notes: Sends error alerts to admin Slack channel for immediate attention

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns success response to the form submission

main.node: Google Sheets — Log Low Intent Lead
Google Sheets — Log High Intent Lead
Google Sheets — Log Medium Intent Lead
